settings.title: What products does Toylicious.pk offer?
settings.text: At toylicious.pk, we offer a wide range of fun and trendy toys for kids including electric toys, bubble guns, RC cars, educational toys, pretend play sets, art & drawing kits, and much more.

settings.title: Do you deliver all over Pakistan?
settings.text: Yes! 🚚 We deliver nationwide across Pakistan through trusted courier services.

settings.title: Do you sell original products?
settings.text: We focus on providing high-quality products that match the shown pictures and descriptions as closely as possible.

settings.title: How many days does delivery take?
settings.text:
Delivery usually takes:

  • 2–4 working days for major cities
  • 4–6 working days for remote areas

settings.title: What payment methods do you accept?
Can I open the parcel before payment?
settings.text: Yes ✅ At toylicious.pk, we allow parcel opening before payment so you can check the product for satisfaction and peace of mind before completing your payment.

settings.title: Are your toys safe for children?
settings.text: Yes ✅ We carefully select toys made from child-friendly and durable materials. Adult supervision is still recommended for younger kids.

settings.title: Do your products come with batteries?
settings.text: Yes 🔋 Most of our toys come with batteries included so your kids can start enjoying them right away. Any specific battery details are clearly mentioned in the product description on toylicious.pk.

settings.title: What if I receive a damaged or wrong item?
settings.text: If you receive a damaged or incorrect item, contact us within 24 hours with pictures/videos and our support team will assist you.

settings.title: Can I return or exchange a product?
settings.text: Yes, exchange is possible in case of damaged, defective, or incorrect products according to our return policy.

settings.title: How can I place an order?
settings.text: Simply visit toylicious.pk, add your favorite products to cart, and proceed to checkout. You can also place orders through our social media pages.

settings.title: Are your toys suitable for gifts?
settings.text: Absolutely! 🎁 Our toys are perfect for birthdays, Eid gifts, return gifts, and special occasions.

settings.title: Can I track my order?
settings.text: Yes, once your order is dispatched, tracking details are shared with you via message.
